channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Israel-Hezbollah fighting escalates as US-Iran talks are postponed
item.description: The US-Iran deal faces an early challenge as fighting in Lebanon between Israel and Hezbollah reignites and next-phase talks are delayed.

item.title: Man charged in death of girl after Kristi Noem commuted his life sentence
item.description: McKenna Wendel was last seen alive on March 14 and her body was found near Brookings, about an hour north of Sioux Falls, on March 19.

item.title: Remnants of Tropical Storm Arthur flood homes and force evacuations in Gulf states
item.description: The remnants of Tropical Storm Arthur brought heavy rain to parts of the southeastern US, causing flash flooding.

item.title: Mother's phone calls to police helped uncover alleged UFC Freedom 250 plot
item.description: Her son, Tycen Proper, has been charged in connection with the alleged plot.
